title: Hazen's Cinderous Tooltips
description: An compat resourcepack for Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks's CInderous rarity for Obscure Tooltips.
body:
# **Hazen's Cinderous Tooltip**

![A preview of the Cinderous Rarity Tooltip.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/095afc5c1f383306a431eed74586a896804a2cc1.png)

I've been wanting compat with Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks and Obscure Tooltips, so I decided to make this resourcepack!

What the resourcepack does is that it gives the Cinderous Rarity from Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks lang and a custom tooltip frame.

This does require **Obscure Tooltips** to work.
